blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,374 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
